rules.summaryOnly: Review checks enforce concise summary fields, module titles only, valid relatedSlugs, and explicit HRD confirmation before badges/schema appear.
rules.hrdClaimable: false means unconfirmed or not claimable. Do not switch to true without source PDF/title-page or Icon Learning confirmation.
